calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-341 E3 score-collapse diagnostic (P2 of behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan)
items.note: P2 diagnostic for behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md (registered 2026-05-25). Instrumentation-only single-arm run on main-path config (SP-CEM + MECH-313 noise floor + V_s + SD-054 reef + z_goal + drive_weight=2.0; matches V3-EXQ-543k / V3-EXQ-605 wiring). 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 100 ep (60 P0 warmup + 40 P1 measurement) x 200 steps. NO substrate change -- script only adds per-tick logging of (a) pre-E3 CEM candidate trajectory_class_count, (b) per-class E3 score stats (mean/std/n) read from agent.e3.last_scores, (c) post-E3 selected class (argmin of last_scores -- E3's own pick, BEFORE noise-floor / commitment), (d) score_top2_class_gap on per-class means, (e) committed class from action.argmax. Decision-rule output: applies R2.a (frac_pre_ge2 >= 0.5 AND frac_e3_collapse >= 0.8 -> theory 2 confirmed, MECH-341 substrate work justified; near-tie-vs-large-gap chooses MECH-341 design option) vs R2.b (frac_e3_collapse < 0.5 -> theory 2 not load-bearing, no substrate work triggered) vs inconclusive vs low_precondition (re-evaluate theory 1 via V3-EXQ-569 first). EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic, evidence_direction=non_contributory (excluded from confidence/conflict scoring). claim_ids=[MECH-341]. PASS gate: instrumentation present + >=2/3 seeds reach P1 completion + interpretation label fires unambiguously (not no_pre_ge2_measurements). Pre-warm regime adopts autopsy V3-EXQ-603b finding (60 ep P0 to populate residue/EWMA/V_s before measurement). validate_experiments OK; validate_queue OK; dry-run smoke (1 seed / 4 ep / 30 steps) PASS with interpretation label populated. See REE_assembly/evidence/planning/behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md and claims.yaml MECH-341.

items.title: Q-045 MECH-313 vs MECH-260 four-arm ablation (500-step + reduced hazard_harm)
items.note: arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-H / IGW-20260521-003. Supersedes V3-EXQ-603a (measurement_gap). Two-fix retest: (Fix A, per failure-autopsy V3-EXQ-603 retest spec section 11) STEPS_PER_EPISODE 200 -> 500; (Fix B, env-side reach extension added after env-code review of causal_grid_world.py:2024) hazard_harm 0.05 -> 0.02. Read confirmed env terminates on agent_health <= 0 OR env.steps >= 500; seeds 42/44 in 603a died at step ~14 from health depletion, NOT step-cap. Queue calibration note documents that hazard_harm=0.02 yields ~182-step episodes vs ~18 at 0.5, well past the 75-step FIFO warmup. Decoupled from latent harm signals: z_harm_s reads harm_obs (proximity field, scaled by proximity_harm_scale UNCHANGED), z_harm_a EMA over harm_obs_a UNCHANGED; AIC / MECH-091 / MECH-302 / dACC anti-recency / MECH-313 all read independent paths. Biological framing: raising lethality threshold without anesthetizing nociception. KEEP FIFO_WARMUP_STEPS=75 + per-episode gate + 4 arms + ARM-vs-ARM_0. 8-cell-design reference in autopsy artifact held out of scope. claim_ids: Q-045, MECH-313, MECH-260.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-005: 4-phase infant curriculum vs flat parameter baselines (GAP-14)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-14 closure. PASS confirms ARC-046 (phased residue accumulation via curriculum); unblocks DEV-NEED-008. Phase-2 cutover interrupted Mac run (~62%); no _partial checkpoint -- full rerun.
